---
title: "Final Project: Build Your Own Beginner Program"
---

## Goal

Design and build one small program of your own. This is the final project for the beginner course.

## Choose one project

1. Quiz game with saved scores
2. Flashcard trainer
3. Score tracker
4. Personal notebook
5. Shopping list app
6. Dice or guessing game
7. Practice log
8. Your own idea

## Requirements

Your program should include at least five of these:

- `input()`
- variables
- `if`, `elif`, or `else`
- a loop
- a list
- a dictionary
- a function
- reading or writing a file
- error handling
- simple tests with `assert`
- a graph

## Planning template

```text
Project name:
Goal:
Inputs:
Outputs:
Data needed:
Functions needed:
Files needed:
Steps:
Possible errors:
Extension ideas:
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The program runs without crashing in normal use.
- [ ] The instructions are clear.
- [ ] The variable names make sense.
- [ ] The program uses functions where helpful.
- [ ] The program saves information if needed.
- [ ] The program handles at least one possible error.
- [ ] I tested the program with more than one example.
- [ ] I can explain how the program works.
